allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -ge 5173 -and $_.LocalPort -le 5180 } | Select-Object LocalPort | Sort-Object LocalPort -Unique)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 5173,5174,5175 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{ Port=$_.LocalPort; PID=$_.OwningProcess; Name=$p.ProcessName; Started=$p.StartTime } } | Sort-Object Port -Unique | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 5173,5174,5175 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $ids = \($c | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique\); Write-Output "종료할 PID: $ids"; Stop-Process -Id $ids -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 400 } else { Write-Output "이미 비어 있음" }; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 5173,5174,5175 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count)
PowerShell(cd c:\\Users\\A\\Desktop\\apgujeong-main; git ls-files | Select-String -Pattern "^\\.env$|^\\.env\\." ; Write-Output "---커밋된 파일 수---"; \(git ls-files | Measure-Object\).Count)

PowerShell(cd c:\\Users\\A\\Desktop\\apgujeong-main; $env:BASE_PATH="/apgujeong/"; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-String "built in|error|dist/index"; Remove-Item Env:\\BASE_PATH; Write-Output "--- 404.html 생성 확인 ---"; Test-Path dist\\404.html; Write-Output "--- index.html 자산 경로 ---"; Select-String -Path dist\\index.html -Pattern "/apgujeong/" | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim\(\) })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://msshin99.github.io/apgujeong-main/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)"; \($r.Content -split "`n" | Select-String "<title>|assets/index"\).Line.Trim\(\) } catch { Write-Output "요청 실패: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(cd c:\\Users\\A\\Desktop\\apgujeong-main; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $id = \(gh run list --repo msshin99/apgujeong-main --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId'\); Write-Output "실행 ID: $id"; gh run watch $id --repo msshin99/apgujeong-main --exit-status --interval 10 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 4)

PowerShell(cd c:\\Users\\A\\Desktop\\apgujeong-main; gh run list --repo msshin99/apgujeong-main --limit 1 --json status,conclusion --jq '.[0] | "\\\(.status\) / \\\(.conclusion\)"'; Write-Output "--- 배포된 이미지 응답 확인 ---"; foreach \($p in @\("/apgujeong-main/images/notice/n1.png","/apgujeong-main/images/pages/menu-hero.png","/apgujeong-main/fonts/shippori-mincho-latin-500.woff2"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://msshin99.github.io$p" -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Output "$\($r.StatusCode\)  $p" } catch { Write-Output "실패  $p" } })
Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/import \\{ DESIGN_W, useWidthScale \\} from "\\.\\.\\/useCanvasScale\\.js";/import { useWidthScale } from "..\\/useCanvasScale.js";/' src/pages/PageShell.jsx)
